_comment: Preview sweep for Task 2D.4. Grid axes chosen so the Session 10 anchor (V=0.5, sigma=4, m0=2, a=0.3, ell=4, r=6) lies exactly on the grid (linear axes), letting the local 3-point smoke test reproduce wec_pass_fraction~0.987 against the notebook. ~324 raw points, runs in ~15-20 min on HF Jobs cpu-upgrade.
